creator: ports@christianserving.org
text:
He beat me to it!  Looks good.  Approved...


On 12 Mar, 2007, at 2:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/imapsync,
>
> Please note that PR ports/110210 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/110210
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
